chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD C.P. No.S-1719 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For katcha peshi. 18.11.2016. Petitioner present in person. Mr. Imdad Ali Memon, Advocate alongwith respondents No.5 to 7 and 11 to 13 & 14. Mr. Sher Muhammad Leghari, State Counsel a/w SIP Javed Akhtar o/b of DIG Hyderabad, SIP Muhammad Siddique Mallah o/b of SHO P.S Hala and SSP Matiari and Syed Abdul Latif SHO Kotri, = Petitioner is present in person, while his Counsel is called absent. Today, the parawise comments are filed on behalf of official respondents, wherein they have denied the allegations against the police officials but have stated that between the parties there is a dispute of commercial transaction as a cheque issued by the petitioner in favour of the private respondents on presentment was dishonoured, for which the private respondents have already invoked the jurisdiction of the competent Court. Be that as it may, the respondents are at liberty to seek their remedy before the concerned competent Court but shall not cause any harassment or extend any threats to the petitioner. With these observations, the present constitutional petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Shahid
